navigation.conversionHook: Let's talk about your next digital product.

hero.title: Accelerate your Roadmap with World-Class Engineering
hero.subtitle: Dibrand is an engineering boutique providing senior staff augmentation and end-to-end product development for high-impact startups. We integrate AI, Web, and Mobile specialists that merge with your team to build scalable platforms, from architecture to launch.

whatWeDo.title: What we do
whatWeDo.subtitle: We build and run dedicated development teams for companies that need to move fast.
whatWeDo.description: From product execution to continuous development, we help you scale without growing internal structure. Let’s turn your roadmap into real progress.
whatWeDo.tagline: Let us make your idea a reality!

items.title: AI-Augmented Staffing
items.desc: Scale your squad in 72 hours with Senior Developers equipped with AI tools.

techStack.title: Yes. We cover your tech stack.
techStack.subtitle: Our expert team has mastery over the most in-demand languages and frameworks.

testimonials.title: Dibrand in the Voice of our Partners
testimonials.subtitle: Dibrand is the strategic partner for companies seeking excellence in software engineering.

staffAugmentationTeaser.title: Dibrand's Staff Augmentation Model
staffAugmentationTeaser.subtitle: Dibrand provides access to the top 3% of LATAM’s senior engineering talent. Our professionals are not just coders; they are AI-native consultants who integrate into your culture, align with your timezone, and multiply your team’s productivity from day one.

pillars.title: AI-Native Workflow
pillars.desc: Every developer is equipped with an advanced AI stack to automate testing and documentation.

pillars.title: 72-Hour Deployment
pillars.desc: Scalable capacity with pre-vetted seniors ready to ship code.

pillars.title: Direct Ownership
pillars.desc: We handle the back-office, benefits, and retention; you keep 100% of the IP and control.

fullCycle.title: Full-Cycle Product Development
fullCycle.desc: We build scalable web and mobile applications from scratch. We handle the architectural design, user experience (UX/UI), high-performance development, and cloud deployment.

staffAug.title: Staff Augmentation
staffAug.desc: Dibrand's model integrates senior technical talent directly into your team. Pre-validated, bilingual, and AI-native profiles to multiply your roadmap's velocity.

items.title: IP Protection
items.desc: Full legal transfer of intellectual property under international standards.

items.title: Secure Coding
items.desc: SOC2-aligned development practices and rigorous background checks.

items.title: Nearshore Synergy
items.desc: Real-time collaboration. No 'black boxes', no lag, just high-bandwidth communication.

portfolio.headline: Our Work
portfolio.subheadline: Explore our portfolio to see how we turn ideas into exceptional experiences.

hero.title: Engineering Velocity for Decision Makers.
hero.subtitle: Stop adding headcount. Start adding impact. Dibrand deploys AI-augmented engineering squads that don't just fill seats—they own your roadmap and accelerate your time-to-market.

whatIs.title: Strategic Talent Integration
whatIs.content: Access the top 3% of LATAM’s senior engineering talent. Our professionals are not just coders; they are AI-native consultants who integrate into your culture, align with your timezone, and multiply your team’s productivity from day one.

items.title: Rigorous Selection (Top 3%)
items.desc: We evaluate technical skills, critical thinking, and cultural fit. We only present profiles that have already passed our Live Coding tests.

items.title: Fast Onboarding
items.desc: Don't wait months. We integrate specialists into your team within 2 to 4 weeks, ready to deliver value from the first sprint.

items.title: Total Alignment
items.desc: Real-time collaboration. Our developers work in your time zone, are proficient in English, and join your dailies as one more member of the house.

steps.title: Discovery
steps.desc: We understand your technical needs and team culture.

steps.title: Technical Match
steps.desc: We select the best candidates from our pre-validated pool.

steps.title: Integration
steps.desc: Guided onboarding and continuous scaling according to project demand.

items.title: Fullstack Developers
items.desc: Experts in Node.js, React, Python, and scalable architectures.

items.title: Mobile Engineers
items.desc: Native and hybrid development (React Native, Flutter, Swift, Kotlin).

items.title: DevOps & Cloud
items.desc: Infrastructure as code, CI/CD, and management on AWS/Azure/GCP.

items.title: QA Automation
items.desc: We ensure quality with rigorous automated and manual testing.

items.title: Data & AI
items.desc: Data engineers and Machine Learning model specialists.

services.intro: At Dibrand, we accelerate your technical roadmap by integrating AI-augmented engineering squads directly into your organization—with zero friction.

items.desc: We work in your same time zone for smooth and real-time collaboration.

items.title: Product Culture
items.desc: We don’t just write code; we understand the business and propose value-adding solutions.
